rationale: Educ. Code §39.306 governs school district annual performance reporting. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b). The proposed exemption increase has no bearing on performance report content or requirements.
quote: Each board of trustees shall publish an annual report describing the educational performance of the district and of each campus in the district
_note: No conflict found. §39.306 addresses performance reporting and does not reference homestead exemption values.
